# FreelancerToolkit — llms.txt
# https://freeltools.com

## About
FreelancerToolkit (freeltools.com) provides 17 free business tools for freelancers, agencies, and independent consultants. All tools run in-browser with no login or account required.

## Tools Available
- Freelancer Rate Calculator — calculate hourly rate based on income goals, tax, and expenses
- Project Cost Calculator — build quotes with scope buffers and revision rounds
- Agency Pricing Calculator — set agency service prices
- Break-Even Calculator — find the break-even point for freelance projects
- Revenue Goal Calculator — calculate revenue needed to hit income targets
- Profit Margin Calculator — calculate profit margins on projects
- Upwork Fee Calculator — calculate Upwork platform fees and net earnings
- Freelancer Commission Calculator — compare commission fees across Upwork, Fiverr, Freelancer.com, PeoplePerHour
- Hourly vs Fixed Price Calculator — compare billing models
- Proposal Generator — generate professional client proposals
- Scope of Work Generator — create detailed scope of work documents
- Discovery Call Script Generator — structured scripts for client discovery calls
- Client Questionnaire Generator — onboarding questionnaires for new clients
- Retainer Calculator — price recurring retainer engagements
- Meeting Cost Calculator — calculate the cost of meetings
- Invoice Generator — create professional invoices, export as PDF
- Commission Calculator — calculate sales commissions

## Use
These tools are free to use. No account, no login, no data stored server-side. Built for freelancers by freelancers.

## Contact
Site: https://freeltools.com
